'''鈭歯g-d-l-t''' ('''kangadletoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:workhouse|workhouse]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-d-l-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:workhouse|workhouse]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-d-l-t
|-
! Lemma
| kangadletoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingadletoko|thingadletoko]] || [[word:jingadletoko|jingadletoko]] || [[word:shingadletoko|shingadletoko]] || [[word:kingadletoko|kingadletoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungadletoko|thuthungadletoko]] || [[word:jujungadletoko|jujungadletoko]] || [[word:shushungadletoko|shushungadletoko]] || [[word:kukungadletoko|kukungadletoko]]
|-

|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thungadletoko|thungadletoko]] || [[word:jungadletoko|jungadletoko]] || [[word:shungadletoko|shungadletoko]] || [[word:kungadletoko|kungadletoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thengadletoko|thengadletoko]] || [[word:jengadletoko|jengadletoko]] || [[word:shengadletoko|shengadletoko]] || [[word:kengadletoko|kengadletoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongadletoko|thothongadletoko]] || [[word:jojongadletoko|jojongadletoko]] || [[word:shoshongadletoko|shoshongadletoko]] || [[word:kokongadletoko|kokongadletoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongadletoko|thongadletoko]] || [[word:jongadletoko|jongadletoko]] || [[word:shongadletoko|shongadletoko]] || [[word:kongadletoko|kongadletoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongadletoko|thongadletoko]] || [[word:jongadletoko|jongadletoko]] || [[word:shongadletoko|shongadletoko]] || [[word:kongadletoko|kongadletoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙ngadletoko|th忙ngadletoko]] || [[word:j忙ngadletoko|j忙ngadletoko]] || [[word:sh忙ngadletoko|sh忙ngadletoko]] || [[word:k忙ngadletoko|k忙ngadletoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathangadletoko|thathangadletoko]] || [[word:jajangadletoko|jajangadletoko]] || [[word:shashangadletoko|shashangadletoko]] || [[word:kakangadletoko|kakangadletoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangadletoko|thangadletoko]] || [[word:jangadletoko|jangadletoko]] || [[word:shangadletoko|shangadletoko]] || [[word:kangadletoko|kangadletoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangadletoko|thangadletoko]] || [[word:jangadletoko|jangadletoko]] || [[word:shangadletoko|shangadletoko]] || [[word:kangadletoko|kangadletoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
